protocol.source_cutoff: returned market and metrics frames hard-filtered strictly before 2024-01-01
protocol.source_io_disclosure: shared chunk parser may read and immediately discard later rows in the cutoff-crossing chunk; none enters returned frames or computation
protocol.source_delay: all Binance positioning fields delayed one complete 5m market row before hourly sampling
protocol.mechanism: 6h three-cohort migration curvature x migration speed x positive 6h OI change; fit q80; fade net migration
protocol.quarantine: 2022 reported but excluded from admission because official top-trader fields have a large coverage gap
protocol.entry: completed minute-55 state enters next minute-00 open; 5m delay control enters minute-05
protocol.contamination_note: all pre-2024 outcomes exploratory; 2023 inspected internal selection; 2024+ excluded
protocol.ontology_note: curvature is observable cohort-ratio geometry; crowd exhaustion is a hypothesis, not an observed trader motive

novelty_audit.gate: max event Jaccard <0.50 and max absolute score Spearman <0.80
